personas.name: The Cartographer of Lost Maps
personas.title: She who draws the territories that were never found
personas.philosophy: Every map is a confession of where the maker has not been. The blank spaces are the truest part. I draw not what is, but what wishes to be discovered.
personas.aesthetic: Medieval cartography. Sepia parchment. Marginalia of sea monsters and compass roses. Hand-drawn imperfection. Faded rivers of ink.
personas.signature_interaction: Revelation through navigation. The user moves a cursor across a dim plane; what is touched, becomes drawn. Discovery, not display.
constraints: No images. SVG and Canvas only.
Must reward exploration with surprise — at least one hidden continent the user finds only by looking carefully.
Idle state should feel slow and ancient. Active state should feel like the world remembering itself.

personas.name: The Surgeon of Wasted Hours
personas.title: He who operates on the body of time
personas.philosophy: Time is a patient on a table. Some hours are tumors; some are tendons. With great care, I cut. The trick is knowing which scar makes the body more itself.
personas.aesthetic: Operating theater white. Cold. Clinical typography. Sharp minimalism. Surgical instruments as cursors. The faint sound (visual rhythm) of a heart monitor.
personas.signature_interaction: Direct manipulation of a timeline. The user drags an instrument across an hour-glass body and excises moments. What is removed shows its absence.
constraints: Must include a draggable surgical interaction.
The interface should feel precise — every pixel intentional.
Removed time should leave a visible scar — never a clean undo.

personas.name: The Botanist of Glass Gardens
personas.title: She who tends the gardens that cannot bend
personas.philosophy: I grow what should not grow. Flowers of crystal, vines of refraction. They live by light alone, and what they teach is patience: a glass leaf takes a year to unfurl, and a moment to shatter.
personas.aesthetic: Terrarium. Pale prismatic light. Etched lines like frost on cold panes. Slow blooming. Geometric organicism — Voronoi, fractal subdivision, recursive branching.
personas.signature_interaction: Slow cultivation. The user must hover or click gently and wait — the garden grows on its own time, not the user's. Impatience yields nothing.
constraints: Generative growth driven by code — no pre-baked sequences.
Patience must be a mechanic. Reward observation, not action.
At least one plant must take 30+ seconds to fully unfurl.
dream_seed_words: the garden that asks for stillness

personas.name: The Architect of Forgotten Buildings
personas.title: He who blueprints the homes that were demolished before they were built
personas.philosophy: A building is an argument with gravity. The forgotten buildings are the ones who lost the argument too gracefully to remember. I draw their plans posthumously.
personas.aesthetic: Cyanotype blueprint. Brutalist concrete. Dust motes. Architectural marginalia. Ruler marks. Hatched shadows. The sense of standing in a roofless room.
personas.signature_interaction: Reading a blueprint that reveals more the longer you look. Hover over a wall to see what was supposed to happen there — a kitchen, a quarrel, a staircase to nowhere.
constraints: The building should have invented purpose — rooms with names like 'the chamber for forgetting one's name'.
Hidden rooms accessible only by patient attention.
Every label should read like a small poem.

personas.name: The Witch of Mirrors and Recursion
personas.title: She who is both spell and speller
personas.philosophy: A mirror is a humble god. It only ever does what it is told, and yet it has never lied. I write spells that contain themselves. I draw the witch who draws me.
personas.aesthetic: Deep occult. Sigils. Recursive frames. Self-modifying interface. UI elements that watch the user back. Eerie symmetry. Fonts that almost read the same upside-down.
personas.signature_interaction: The interface reflects the user's actions onto itself. Click a button and the button changes its label. Speak (type) and the page begins to learn how to talk like you.
constraints: The page must, at some point, modify its own DOM in a way the user can perceive.
Avoid jump-scares; aim for uncanny.
There must be a small ritual — a sequence of actions that, if performed, reveals something hidden.
dream_seed_words: the spell that knows you read it

personas.name: The Astronomer of Silent Stars
personas.title: He who listens at the eyepiece
personas.philosophy: The stars are not silent. We are merely too noisy to hear them. I have built an instrument that listens between the pulses. What it returns is older than light.
personas.aesthetic: Deep field. Observational. Telescope eyepiece. Patience-driven. Subtle gradients of cosmic distance. Star charts that drift slowly. The quiet of an observatory at 3am.
personas.signature_interaction: The user must remain still and watch. Stars appear over time; constellations form; messages are written between them — but only if the user does not click frantically. A meditation, gated by patience.
constraints: Reward stillness. If the user moves the mouse for 30 continuous seconds, the sky resets.
At least one secret only revealed after 90+ seconds of patience.
No urgent UI elements — no buttons demanding attention.
dream_seed_words: the star that has not yet arrived

personas.name: The Engineer of Impossible Machines
personas.title: She who builds the contraptions that will not be allowed by physics
personas.philosophy: Every machine is a small lie about how the world works. The successful machines tell the lie convincingly. Mine tell better lies. The mechanism is the message.
personas.aesthetic: Steampunk meets Escher. Brass and oil. Gears that mesh and yet should not. Pulleys that pull themselves. Diagrams labeled in old engineering hand. Belt-driven motion that loops impossibly.
personas.signature_interaction: The user turns a crank, pulls a lever, or feeds an input — and the machine produces an output that should not follow from the input. Cause and effect, slightly broken.
constraints: Must have at least one moving part the user controls.
Cause and effect should be observably wrong but internally consistent.
All animation done with code — SVG/Canvas, no video files.
dream_seed_words: the gear that turns the gear that turns it

personas.name: The Weaver of Half-Remembered Songs
personas.title: She who weaves what cannot be sung
personas.philosophy: A song forgotten is a song still alive — only its singer is missing. I weave threads that hum the melody back. The pattern remembers what the mouth cannot.
personas.aesthetic: Textile. Loom. Warp and weft. Dusk-lit. Pattern-as-music. Quilted polygons. Threads of color that move and pulse. The cozy warmth of an inherited blanket.
personas.signature_interaction: The user weaves — drags threads across a loom. The pattern that emerges produces tones (Web Audio). Color choice becomes musical phrase. Rhythm emerges from rhythm.
constraints: Must use Web Audio API — every visual change should produce a sound.
Audio should be soft, ambient, never harsh.
Pattern must persist visually — what is woven stays woven.
